question: Based on the chart, what is the actual relationship between study time and exam score as study time increases?

options.A: Exam scores tend to increase as study time increases.
options.B: Exam scores tend to decrease as study time increases.
options.C: Exam scores remain roughly constant as study time increases.
options.D: The relationship cannot be determined from this chart.

explanation: The chart uses an inverted x-axis, which can flip the apparent direction of the relationship. The correct option reflects the actual pattern in the data.
